# AI Native Club

> The club for AI-native builders. Advisory + community for technical co-founders building AI-native companies.

AI Native Club is an advisory and community for technical co-founders building AI-native companies in the $50K–$2M ARR range. Members get roadmap support, product strategy, hiring guidance, and deal support — all leveraging AI. Founded by Thomas Bustos.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://ainativeclub.com): Overview, value proposition, and apply CTA
- [Apply](https://ainativeclub.com/apply): Application to join the club

## About

- Founder: Thomas Bustos — https://thomasbustos.com
- Focus: AI-native startups, technical co-founders, $50K–$2M ARR
- What members get: Better decisions, faster growth, a tight network of 30 founders
